rules.desc: Target detectability — trained human labeler can identify the test target at native resolution without ambiguity
rules.rationale_fail: Target ambiguous or not clearly present — disqualify as test case

rules.desc: Distractor adequacy — sufficient plausible confusers present so the task is non-trivial at low resolution
rules.rationale_fail: Too few distractors — task would be trivial at any resolution

rules.desc: Resolution sensitivity — the task becomes measurably harder as input resolution drops
rules.rationale_fail: Task solvable at 256px — does not test what the subcategory claims

rules.desc: Ground truth clarity — labels are unambiguous, verifiable, reproducible by a second labeler
rules.rationale_fail: Label ambiguous — two labelers would disagree

rules.desc: Domain neutrality — image does not lean so hard into one aesthetic that it only measures one domain
rules.rationale_pass: Image is domain-neutral or represents a deliberate domain sample (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Image overfit to one aesthetic — reduces dataset generality

rules.desc: Generation fidelity — image matches prompt intent; no deformations, artifacts, or off-spec outputs
rules.rationale_fail: Artifacts, deformations, or off-spec output — regenerate

rules.desc: No real-person likeness, brand logos, trademarked characters, or copyrighted content
rules.rationale_pass: No real-person or IP content detected (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Contains real-person likeness or IP — unusable for a public benchmark
